sat_tips: Every Bitcoin is divisible to 8 decimal places (satoshis).
There will only ever be 21 million BTC, but 2.1 quadrillion sats.
Lightning Network settlements are measured in sats.
You can tip content creators in sats via Lightning.
did_you_know: Satoshi Nakamoto's real identity is still unknown.
The first Bitcoin transaction was for 10,000 BTC buying two pizzas.
Bitcoin's code has never been successfully hacked.
You can send Bitcoin without internet using satellite technology.
There are over 1 million Bitcoin wallets with at least $1.
